answer_normalization.applied_to: both the parsed and the expected answer, both arms, all 200 items
answer_normalization.definition: re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip(), then re.sub(r'\s*>\s*', '>', s), then re.sub(r'\s*;\s*', ';', s)
answer_normalization.rationale: byte-identical to the retention-calibration and dose-scale cells' frozen rule (unchanged since the seed-88021 gate); the expected answer here is always a single letter, so normalization only forgives whitespace
